zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Empson II於1490年出生在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Empson24歲，母親Ethelreda Wolston24歲。他於1512年與Agnes Thomas在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伊斯頓 奧 馮 希爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年11月11日在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特享年55歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Empson II于1490年出生在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Empson24岁，母亲Ethelreda Wolston24岁。他于1512年与Agnes Thomas在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾伊斯頓 奧 馮 希爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年11月11日在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特享年55岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Empson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic meaning ‘son of Emma’, from the Middle English female personal name Em(e), Emme (see Imm ) + -son.
shortened form of Emerson . The two names were no doubt confused, and it is possible that the reverse process sometimes occurred, whereby Em(m)erson was an altered form of Emmeson, i.e. Em(p)son.

variants.name: Imeson
meanings: English: variant either of Emmeson (see Empson ) or of Emerson .

variants.name: Impson
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Empson  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US than in Britain.

variants.name: Imm
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Im(m)o, a pet form of names based on Irmin-, a divine or ethnic name formed with irmin, ermen ‘whole, entire’.

English (Wiltshire): from the ancient Germanic female personal name Imma, Emma, of the same origin as in 1 above. In Old English Imma, Emma was borne by both males and females. In Middle English, under Norman influence, the personal name Emm(a), Imm(a) came to be used almost exclusively for women, being taken as a short form of Ermingard.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Empson II was born in 1490, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Empson, was 24 and his mother, Ethelreda Wolston, was 24. He married Agnes Thomas in 1512, in Easton on the Hill, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 11 November 1545, in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Empson II est né en 1490, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Empson, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ethelreda Wolston, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Thomas en 1512, à Easton on the Hill, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1545, à St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

Er hat 1512 in Easton on the Hill, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1545 im Alter von 55 Jahren in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Empson II è nato il nel 1490 nel Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Empson, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Ethelreda Wolston, aveva 24 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Empson IIが1490年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Empsonは24歳，母Ethelreda Wolstonは24歳であった。1512年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエアストン オン ス ヒルでAgnes Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年11月11日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタースト マーガレットで55歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Empson II(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Empson(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Ethelreda Wolston(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 이스트  테 힐에서 Agnes Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 11월 11일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 마거릿에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Empson II nasceu em 1490, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Empson, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ethelreda Wolston, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Thomas em 1512, em Easton on the Hill, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Empson II родился в 1490 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Empson было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ethelreda Wolston, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Thomas в 1512 г. в местности эастон он т хилл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 11 ноября 1545 г. в местности ст маргарет, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.
